Theater Department Special Talent Exam 3. Stage Those Eligible to Take the 100% Scholarship Exam

The list below is determined only for the 100% scholarship exam. The final lists will be published by 23:59 on August 21, 2023.

Candidates invited to the 3rd stage exam will take the 2nd stage exam. They must choose one of the tirades they participated in the stage. The selected piece is expected to be reworked and presented, taking into account the orientations given by the jury in the first and second stages.

The 3rd stage exam will be held on Monday, August 21, 2023, at Sahne KHAS (Kadir Has University Cibali Campus). Candidates must be present at the exam site with their IDs one hour before the exam.

The list below has been created in numerical order, not in order of success.

The list below has been created in numerical order, not in order of success. Stage List
